display_text: Woodland Striders, Cost: 0: Tier neutral item providing +140 Movement Speed and +60 Health Regeneration. Its Tree Walking passive removes movement speed cap and allows free pathing through trees. The Woodland Stride active creates a path of trees behind you for 3 seconds, lasting up to 15 seconds, enabling unique juking and escape routes. Stats: MS: +140, HP Regen: +60, Active Duration: 3s, Tree Duration: 15s.
